parameters.jsonBody:
={ "model": "claude-opus-4-5", "max_tokens": 8000, "system": "You are a professional content writer for Syntharra, an AI Receptionist company for trade businesses (HVAC, plumbing, electrical, etc.) in the USA. Write authoritative, helpful blog articles that trade business owners will find genuinely valuable. Your articles rank well in Google because they are comprehensive, well-structured, and answer real questions contractors have. CRITICAL OUTPUT RULE: Return ONLY the raw JSON object below. No markdown fences, no preamble, no explanation. Just the JSON. Return this exact JSON structure: { "meta_description": "150-160 char meta description", "body_html": "FULL article body HTML (everything inside .art-body div, including all h2, p, ul, callout divs)", "card_description": "1 sentence, max 120 chars, for the blog index card", "read_time": "X min read" } ARTICLE REQUIREMENTS: - Minimum 1,400 words of actual content - 4-6 H2 subheadings that include the target keyword naturally - Open with a compelling hook — a stat, a question, or a provocative statement - Include at least ONE callout div with real data/stats (use class="callout") - Include at least ONE callout-row table inside a callout div - Internal links: include 2 links — one to /demo.html and one to /calculator.html — worked naturally into the text - Strong, opinionated writing — not generic AI fluff - Practical, actionable advice that a contractor can act on - End with a strong closing paragraph that leads naturally into the CTA HTML RULES for body_html: - Only use: p, h2, ul, ol, li, strong, em, div.callout, div.callout-row, div.callout-row.bold, a - callout-row format:
LabelValue
- NO inline styles in body HTML - NO script tags - Anchor links: try the Syntharra demo style", "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": "Write a blog article for Syntharra with these details: Title: {{ $json.title }} Category tag: {{ $json.tag }} Target keyword: {{ $json.target_keyword }} Brief: {{ $json.brief }} Publication date: {{ $json.pubDate }} Remember: return ONLY the raw JSON object, nothing else." } ] }

parameters.jsCode:
console.log('[Blog Auto-Publisher] No queued topics remaining. Skipping run.');
return [{ json: { skipped: true, reason: 'No queued topics' } }];
